title: Recruiter Screens, Written Communication, and Process Control · Career Evidence Case: Process Access
summary: A fast screening call mixes role interest, evidence, compensation, location, authorization, accommodations, private history, and unclear next steps. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the process access increment in screening conversation and process record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Request process details and needed access adjustments with learner-controlled disclosure and location-specific rights awareness.
Respond to irrelevant, sensitive, or jurisdiction-dependent questions by protecting privacy, redirecting to job function, and seeking qualified local guidance when needed.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Process Access · Theory Process Access
steps.instruction:
theory case — A rushed screen mixes role evidence, pay, location, authorization, access, sensitive history, unclear process, and an implied but unconfirmed next step. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Process Access contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Process Access · Theory Process Access.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for request process details and needed access adjustments with learner-controlled disclosure and location-specific rights awareness. For Predict Process Access · Theory Process Access, keep Process Access connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Process Access condition decided your prediction.

content.value: EEOC Employment Discrimination and AI for Workers — Controls awareness that automated recruiting, screening, assessment, promotion, and pay tools can implicate protected rights and accommodation needs.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A rushed screen mixes role evidence, pay, location, authorization, access, sensitive history, unclear process, and an implied but unconfirmed next step. The worked example variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Request process details and needed access adjustments with learner-controlled disclosure and location-specific rights awareness. A defensible solution applies Process Access, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to screening conversation and process record.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-process-access — Request process details and needed access adjustments with learner-controlled disclosure and location-specific rights awareness.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-3
focus: career-process-access
decision-evidence: Request process details and needed access adjustments with learner-controlled disclosure and location-specific rights awareness.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Request process details and needed access adjustments with learner-controlled disclosure and location-specific rights awareness.
